summary: Iteration 26 - All critical CRUD and security fixes verified. Backend: 12/12 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements verified working.

critical_code_review_comments: DeliveryCreate model correctly includes driver_id field (line 69)
create_delivery endpoint sets company_id from user context (line 1026)
GET /api/deliveries filters by company_id for admin role (line 1057)
NewDeliveryForm has driver selector with data-testid='delivery-driver-select' (line 1572)
Driver quota bar uses drivers.length for dynamic count (line 745)
Delete driver button has onTouchEnd handler for mobile (line 827)
AuthPages.jsx has NO footer on login or register pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 verified all critical CRUD and security fixes: 1) DeliveryCreate model accepts driver_id, create_delivery sets company_id from user context. 2) NewDeliveryForm has driver selector (data-testid='delivery-driver-select') with all company drivers. 3) Chauffeurs tab quota bar uses drivers.length (live count) instead of stale driverQuota.driver_count. 4) Delete driver button has onTouchEnd for mobile touch events. 5) AuthPages.jsx has NO footer on login/register. 6) ThemeToggle visible in admin sidebar. 7) Driver dashboard has scan button (data-testid='driver-scan-btn'). 8) Subscription plans return solo=19€.

delivery_creation_with_company_id.details: POST /api/deliveries returns company_id from user context

deliveries_filtered_by_company.details: GET /api/deliveries filters by company_id for admin role

mobile_touch_events.details: Delete driver button has onTouchEnd handler

no_footer_on_auth_pages.details: Login and Register pages have NO footer element
